<!-- Thanks for opening a PR! Fill in a few quick fields below. -->
<!-- 感谢提 PR！请简单填写下面几项。 -->

## What does this PR do? / 这个 PR 做了什么？

<!-- One or two sentences describing the motivation and changes. -->
<!-- 一两句话说明动机和变更。 -->

## Change type (check one or more) / 变更类型（勾选一个或多个）

- [ ] New example (`examples/`) / 新案例
- [ ] Template (`templates/`) / 模板
- [ ] Prompt (`prompts/`) / 提示词
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`) / 文档
- [ ] CI / scripts / CI / 脚本
- [ ] Worker / deployment / Worker / 部署
- [ ] Other / 其他: ______

## Self-checklist / 自检清单

<!-- Tick the items that apply to your PR. / 至少把和你 PR 相关的项都勾上。 -->

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally / 本地跑 `npm run lint` 通过
- [ ] If a new example: `bash examples/<id>/run.sh` succeeds locally and CapCut opens it / 新案例本地跑成功且剪映可打开
- [ ] If a new example: includes `README.md` (English), `README.zh.md`, `run.sh`, `meta.json`, `preview.gif`; `node scripts/validate-example.mjs <path>` passes / 新案例文件齐全且校验通过
- [ ] All commands use `cutcli` (never `cut`) / 命令都用 `cutcli`
- [ ] No personal local paths / private tokens / `.env` content / 不包含个人本地路径或私有 token
- [ ] All asset URLs are in the [whitelist](../CONTRIBUTING.md#asset-usage-policy) / 引用素材 URL 都在白名单内

## Screenshots / Recording (optional but recommended) / 截图 / 录屏（可选但推荐）

<!-- Drop image / GIF link here. / 拖图片或粘贴 GIF 链接到这里。 -->

## Related issue / 关联 Issue

<!-- Closes #123 -->
